_fixture_note: Shaped like the NIH iCite API's batch response (SPEC.md §7.6). PMID 37000001 is deliberately absent from `data` to exercise the 'not all PMIDs are covered' nullable-citation-count case (§9.2's Paper.citation_count note). Used by Task 1B's respx-mocked iCite client tests, including the graceful-degradation-on-unreachable path (mocked as a connection error/5xx in the test itself, not representable as a fixture payload).
